auth.logoutMock: Mockup: logged out. (No real auth yet.)
auth.notFoundMessage: This link is invalid or has expired. Scan the QR code on your Tach device again.
home.title: Manage vocabulary on Tach
home.subtitle: Language pair comes from your device QR code — change it below if needed.
languagePair.title: Language pair
languagePair.subtitle: Source language (what you already know) and study language (what you want to learn).
languagePair.nativeHint: The language you use to understand meanings — the website UI follows this choice.
languagePair.studyHint: The language you want to learn vocabulary in
languagePair.sameWarning: Both languages are the same — pick different languages to study effectively.
programs.my.title: My programs
programs.my.description: View and manage vocabulary sets you created or are studying.
programs.new.title: Create new program
programs.new.description: Design a new vocabulary set with card templates and playback sequence.
programs.explore.title: Explore programs
programs.explore.description: Browse community programs and system packages.
placeholder.programs.title: My programs
placeholder.programs.description: Your study program list will appear here — filtered by language pair, SRS progress, etc.
placeholder.programsNew.title: Create new program
placeholder.programsNew.description: The vocabulary and card-template wizard will live on this page.
placeholder.explore.title: Explore programs
placeholder.explore.description: Community program library and system packages will appear here.
createProgram.stepName.title: Create program
createProgram.stepName.label: Program name
createProgram.stepSchema.title: Card field structure
createProgram.stepSchema.hint: Each row is one display field. “Text + Audio” splits into text and audio when saved.
createProgram.stepDone.title: Created (mockup)
createProgram.stepDone.subtitle: Not saved to server yet — expanded schema below.
createProgram.stepDone.mockNote: Not saved to server — see mock JSON in the browser console.
createProgram.validation.fieldsRequired: Each field needs a name and at least one schema row.
createProgram.stepCardSetup.title: Levels and cards
createProgram.stepCardSetup.hint: One SRS level by default — add levels if needed. Use ←/→ to shift boundaries like on the Tach device.
createProgram.stepCardSetup.previewHint: Select a face on the right to preview it.
createProgram.stepSide.playbackHint: Drag to reorder · tap ✕ to delete
createProgram.stepSide.playbackEmpty: No playback steps yet — add play or pause.
createProgram.preview.tapToEdit: Tap a region on the card to edit details
createProgram.preview.clickToEdit: Click a region on the card to edit details
createProgram.preview.dragHint: Tap another region to switch · drag body to move · drag corners to resize
createProgram.preview.dragHintDesktop: Click another region to switch · drag body to move · drag corners to resize
createProgram.stepDisplay.previewLabelHi: Leave empty to show the field name in preview.
createProgram.stepDisplay.outstandingCol: Wrap highlighted text in [[ and ]] — brackets are hidden on the card.
createProgram.validation.sidesRequired: Each level needs at least one card face.
createProgram.validation.vocabEmpty: Add at least one vocabulary row.
createProgram.validation.vocabRequiredFi: Each row must fill all text fields shown on the card.
createProgram.validation.vocabRequiredMe: Each row must include image/audio files used on the card or in playback.
createProgram.stepVocab.title: Enter vocabulary
createProgram.stepVocab.hint: Each row is one card item. Select a row to preview — use [[highlights]] in text cells. Add image/audio in the media panel below.
createProgram.stepVocab.previewEmpty: Add a row to preview the card.
createProgram.stepVocab.noTextFields: No text fields in schema — go back and add text columns.
createProgram.stepVocab.mediaHint: Files stay in the browser until upload API is connected. Preview uses local files.
